# GENERATED FROM uv.lock — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.
# Regenerate with:  uv export --format requirements-txt --no-hashes --no-emit-project -o requirements.txt
# (then re-add the --extra-index-url line below; uv export omits it)
#
# Preferred workflow is uv:
#     uv sync                # CPU (this file's equivalent)
#     uv sync --extra gpu    # + CuPy, on a CUDA 12 machine
#
# This file is for plain pip (`pip install -r requirements.txt`, verified working).
# `uv pip install -r requirements.txt` needs --index-strategy unsafe-best-match,
# because uv will not look past the first index that carries a package.
#
# torch is pinned to the CPU build: it is only used for the CPU optimizers in
# readout_node (SGD/Adam over Wout) and nothing is ever moved to a device.
# GPU acceleration goes through CuPy instead — see the 'gpu' extra in pyproject.toml.
--extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu
